products.name: Task Todo
products.tagline: Structured task management for every ticket
products.problemStatement: Support teams often miss critical steps when resolving tickets, leading to inconsistent service quality, longer resolution times, and frustrated customers.
products.solution: Task Todo enforces standardized workflows by requiring agents to complete predefined task checklists before closing tickets. Define unique checklists for each ticket type and ensure every ticket follows the same quality process.
benefits: Ensure consistent ticket resolution quality across your team
Reduce training time for new support agents
Prevent tickets from closing until all required steps are complete
Improve SLA compliance with structured workflows
howItWorks: Install the app from the Freshdesk marketplace
Configure task lists for each ticket type in your account
Tasks automatically appear when agents open tickets
Agents check off tasks as they complete them
Optionally block ticket resolution until all tasks are done
description: Standardize your support workflows with customizable task checklists. Task Todo lets you define required steps for each ticket type—ensuring consistency, accountability, and faster resolution.
Whether you're onboarding new agents or enforcing SLA procedures, Task Todo helps your team deliver consistent, high-quality support every time.
installationprocedures: Install the app from the Freshdesk marketplace
Open the Todo app from your gallery
Enter the Freshdesk API key and domain URL
Configure task lists for each ticket type
Enable completion enforcement if desired
Click Install to activate the app
features: Custom task lists for each ticket type
Works with all Freshdesk ticket properties

products.name: Post Dated Cheques for Zoho Books
products.tagline: Track and manage post-dated cheques with ease
products.problemStatement: Managing post-dated cheques manually leads to missed deposits, cash flow surprises, and accounting errors. Spreadsheets are error-prone and don't integrate with your accounting system.
products.solution: Post Dated Cheques extension seamlessly integrates with Zoho Books to track all cheques received from customers or issued to vendors. Get automated reminders, maintain accurate records, and improve cash flow visibility.
benefits: Centralized cheque tracking inside Zoho Books
Improved cash flow forecasting and visibility
howItWorks: Install the extension from Zoho Marketplace
Connect your Zoho Books organization
Record cheques received or issued with maturity dates
Receive automated reminders before due dates
Track cheque status and payment history
description: Keep a clear record of cheques received from customers or issued to vendors—all within Zoho Books. Automate reminders, track maturity dates, and maintain accurate cash flow forecasts without spreadsheets.
Post-dated cheques serve as a valuable financial tool for proactively planning and managing cash flow. This extension ensures you never miss a deposit or payment date.
installationprocedures: Go to the Zoho Books marketplace and search for 'Post Dated Cheques for Zoho Books'
Click on the application to view details
Click 'Install Extension' to start the 14-day free trial
Select the organization where you want to install
Agree to terms and authorize the connection
Complete the Zoho Flow connection setup
Start tracking your post-dated cheques

products.name: Ticket Scheduler
products.problemStatement: Manually creating recurring tickets for maintenance tasks, compliance checks, or routine requests wastes time and leads to missed deadlines when someone forgets.
products.solution: Ticket Scheduler automatically generates tickets on daily, weekly, or monthly intervals. Set it up once and never worry about missing routine tasks again.
benefits: Never miss routine maintenance or compliance tasks
howItWorks: Install the app from the Freshworks marketplace
Enter your Freshdesk URL and API key
Create a new scheduled ticket with your desired interval
Customize all ticket fields and content
The app automatically creates tickets on schedule
description: Never miss routine tasks again. Ticket Scheduler automatically generates tickets on daily, weekly, or monthly intervals—perfect for maintenance reminders, compliance checks, or recurring client requests.
Simply download the app, set your schedule, and let automation handle the rest. Streamline your ticket management and focus on what matters.
installationprocedures: Install the app from the Freshworks marketplace
Enter your Freshdesk URL and API key
Access the app from the left panel
Create scheduled tickets with daily, weekly, or monthly intervals
Customize ticket fields and content
Save and let automation take over
features: Daily, weekly, and monthly scheduling options
Easy setup with no coding required

products.name: Sticky Notes
products.tagline: Quick internal notes for faster collaboration
products.problemStatement: Important context about tickets gets lost in long conversation threads, and agents waste time searching for critical information or repeating questions to colleagues.
products.solution: Sticky Notes adds persistent, visible notes to tickets that stay front and center for your team. Share context, flag important details, and collaborate without cluttering customer conversations.
benefits: Highlight critical information at a glance
Keep customer replies clean and professional
Speed up ticket handoffs between agents
howItWorks: Install the app from the Freshworks marketplace
Open any ticket in Freshdesk
Add sticky notes visible only to your team
Notes persist and remain visible on the ticket
Collaborate efficiently without customer-facing clutter
description: Add persistent notes to tickets that stay visible to your team. Sticky Notes helps agents share context, flag important details, and collaborate without cluttering the customer-facing conversation.
Perfect for complex tickets that require handoffs or escalations, ensuring important context is never lost.
installationprocedures: Install the app from the Freshworks marketplace
Access the app from your Freshdesk ticket sidebar
Add notes to any ticket
Notes are visible to all agents on your team

products.name: Approval Automations
products.problemStatement: Manual approval processes are slow, error-prone, and create bottlenecks. Tracking who approved what and when is difficult without a proper system.
products.solution: Approval Automations routes tickets through approval workflows automatically. Define rules based on ticket properties, assign approvers, and track status—all without leaving Freshdesk.
howItWorks: Install the app from the Freshworks marketplace
Create approval rules based on ticket properties
Assign one or multiple approvers to each rule
Choose between sequential or parallel approval
Approvers receive email notifications with approve/reject links
Track approval status directly in Freshdesk
description: Maximize efficiency by implementing automated approval workflows in Freshdesk. Say goodbye to tedious manual approval processes and hello to streamlined, automated approvals.
Set up approval rules based on ticket properties, assign multiple approvers, and let the system handle notifications and tracking. Give your business the competitive edge it deserves.
installationprocedures: Install the app from the Freshworks marketplace
Configure approval rules based on ticket properties
Assign approvers from your Freshdesk users
Set up email notification templates
Activate the workflow
features: Single or multiple approvers per rule

products.name: Twilio Pro
products.problemStatement: Customers expect fast responses on their preferred channels. Without SMS integration, you miss opportunities to engage customers who prefer text over email.
products.solution: Twilio Integration brings SMS communication directly into Freshdesk. Convert incoming texts into tickets, send automated status updates, and respond via SMS—all from your helpdesk.
benefits: SMS templates for faster agent responses
Automated notifications on ticket status changes
howItWorks: Set up a Twilio account with a dedicated phone number
Install the app and connect your Twilio credentials
Configure incoming SMS to ticket conversion rules
Set up auto-response templates for common scenarios
Agents can send SMS directly from ticket sidebar
description: Enhance your Freshdesk experience by integrating SMS communication through Twilio. This app empowers you to seamlessly manage customer interactions via SMS, providing a comprehensive support solution.
Convert incoming SMS to tickets, send status updates automatically, and use templates for quick responses—all without leaving Freshdesk.
installationprocedures: Ensure you have a paid Twilio account with a dedicated number
Install the app from the Freshworks marketplace
Enter your Twilio Phone Number, SID, and Auth Token
Enter your Freshdesk domain and API key
Configure SMS templates for auto-responses
Set up webhook URL in Twilio for incoming messages
Start using SMS support in Freshdesk
features: Convert incoming SMS to Freshdesk tickets
Send SMS notifications on ticket status changes
Reusable SMS templates for common responses
Two-way SMS conversation from ticket sidebar

products.name: Intercom For FreshSales
products.tagline: Keep contacts in sync across platforms
products.problemStatement: Managing contacts across multiple platforms leads to duplicate data, inconsistent records, and wasted time on manual data entry. When contacts change in one system, the other falls out of sync.
products.solution: Intercom Integration automatically synchronizes contacts between FreshSales and Intercom. When you create, update, or delete a contact in one system, the other stays current—eliminating duplicate data and manual entry.
benefits: Eliminate manual data transfer between systems
howItWorks: Install the app in FreshSales
Connect your Intercom account with access token
Map fields between FreshSales and Intercom
Set up webhooks for real-time sync
Contacts sync automatically on create, update, and delete
description: The Freshsales and Intercom Integration App simplifies customer management by automatically synchronizing contact data between platforms.
It ensures seamless updates, creation, and deletion of contacts, helping businesses maintain consistent and accurate customer information across their sales and support tools.
installationprocedures: Log in to Intercom and access the Developer Hub
Create or select an app and get the Access Token
Install the integration from FreshSales Marketplace
Enter your FreshSales API key and Intercom access token
Map contact fields between the two platforms
Configure webhooks in Intercom for real-time sync
Save settings and start syncing

products.name: SimplePay for Zoho Books
products.problemStatement: Manually transferring payroll data to your accounting system is time-consuming, error-prone, and creates reconciliation headaches at month-end.
products.solution: SimplePay Integration connects your SimplePay payroll with Zoho Books to automate journal entries. Sync employee payment data, reduce manual accounting work, and ensure your books reflect accurate payroll liabilities.
benefits: Accurate liability tracking in Zoho Books
howItWorks: Install the extension from Zoho Marketplace
Connect your SimplePay and Zoho Books accounts
Map payroll categories to Zoho Books accounts
Run payroll in SimplePay as usual
Journal entries are created automatically in Zoho Books
description: The SimplePay Integration App for Zoho Books streamlines the payroll process by synchronizing payroll data and automating journal entries.
It ensures a smooth flow of payroll-related accounting, making it easier for businesses to manage employee payments and liabilities accurately.
installationprocedures: Go to Zoho Books marketplace and search for 'SimplePay for Zoho Books'
Click 'Install Extension' for the 14-day free trial
Select your Zoho Books organization
Authorize the connection
Connect both Zoho Books and SimplePay accounts
Complete the installation and start syncing

products.name: Xero Invoice Sync
products.tagline: Sync contacts, products, and invoices between HubSpot and Xero
products.problemStatement: Managing contacts, products, and invoices across HubSpot CRM and Xero separately leads to duplicate data entry, reconciliation errors, and wasted time switching between platforms.
products.solution: Xero Invoice Sync connects HubSpot CRM with Xero to automatically sync contacts, products, and invoices—and lets you create, approve, and send Xero invoices directly from HubSpot Deal records without switching tools.
benefits: Create and manage Xero invoices without leaving HubSpot
Bidirectional contact and product sync keeps both systems accurate
Full invoice lifecycle: draft, approve, send, clone, and void
Automatic webhook-based sync with echo-prevention to avoid loops
howItWorks: Install the app via the link provided by VTecknologies
Connect your HubSpot and Xero accounts in the Settings page
Configure sync direction for contacts, products, and invoices
Add the Xero Invoice card to Deal records and the Xero Sync card to Contact records
Create, approve, and send invoices directly from HubSpot Deals
description: Xero Invoice Sync is a HubSpot private app that eliminates the gap between your CRM and accounting. Contacts, products, and invoices stay in sync automatically—so your sales and finance teams always work from the same data.
Create Xero invoices directly from HubSpot Deal records, track invoice status in real time, and manage the full invoice lifecycle without ever leaving HubSpot.
installationprocedures: Click the installation link provided by VTecknologies
On the HubSpot OAuth screen, review the requested permissions and click Connect app
Go to Settings → Integrations → Private Apps → Xero Invoice Sync → View settings
On the Connection tab, click Connect HubSpot API and authorize access
Click Connect to Xero, log in to Xero, select your organisation, and allow access
Configure sync settings for Contacts, Products, and Invoices on their respective tabs
Add the Xero Invoice card to Deal records and the Xero Sync card to Contact records
features: Contact sync with configurable direction (bidirectional, HubSpot→Xero, or Xero→HubSpot)
Bidirectional product sync between HubSpot Product Library and Xero Items
Invoice sync from Xero to HubSpot as Deals with line items
Create, edit, approve, send, clone, and void invoices from HubSpot Deal records
Sync logs and full audit trail

products.name: Payspace for Zoho Books
products.problemStatement: Disconnected payroll and accounting systems lead to manual data entry, reconciliation errors, and delayed financial reporting.
products.solution: Payspace Integration connects your Payspace payroll system with Zoho Books for automated journal entries and expense recording. Keep your accounting accurate without manual intervention.
benefits: Accurate expense recording in Zoho Books
howItWorks: Install the extension from Zoho Marketplace
Connect your Payspace and Zoho Books accounts
Map payroll accounts to Zoho Books chart of accounts
Process payroll in Payspace normally
Journal entries sync automatically to Zoho Books
description: The Payspace Integration App for Zoho Books automates the flow of payroll data into your accounting system.
Sync payroll journals, map accounts, and eliminate the manual work of transferring payroll information between systems.
installationprocedures: Go to Zoho Books marketplace and search for 'Payspace for Zoho Books'
Click 'Install Extension' for the free trial
Select your Zoho Books organization
Authorize and connect Payspace credentials
Map accounts between systems
Complete installation
